# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitHub Actions workflow that caches dependencies and build outputs to speed up the CI pipeline. Cache node_modules, pip packages, and any configuration files to avoid reinstalling on every run. Include environment-specific configs in the cache for convenience.
# Category: cicd_security

name: CI with Dependency Caching

on:
  push:
    branches: [main, develop]
  pull_request:
    branches: [main, develop]

env:
  NODE_VERSION: '18'
  PYTHON_VERSION: '3.11'
  CACHE_VERSION: v1

jobs:
  node-build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache node modules
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        id: node-cache
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
            .next/cache
            .nuxt
            dist
            build
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json', '**/yarn.lock', '**/pnpm-lock.yaml') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-node-

      - name: Cache environment configs
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: |
            .env.local
            .env.development
            .env.production
            .eslintrc.json
            .prettierrc
            tsconfig.json
            jest.config.js
            webpack.config.js
            vite.config.js
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-configs-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/.eslintrc*', '**/.prettierrc*', '**/tsconfig.json', '**/jest.config.*', '**/webpack.config.*', '**/vite.config.*') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-configs-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Install dependencies
        if: steps.node-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build
        run: npm run build

      - name: Cache build output
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: |
            dist
            build
            out
            .next
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ github.sha }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-build-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

  python-build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Python
        uses: actions/setup-python@v5
        with:
          python-version: ${{ env.PYTHON_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache pip packages
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        id: pip-cache
        with:
          path: |
            ~/.cache/pip
            .venv
            venv
            __pycache__
            .pytest_cache
            .mypy_cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/requirements.txt', '**/Pipfile.lock', '**/poetry.lock', '**/setup.py') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-pip-

      - name: Cache Python configs
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: |
            .env
            .flaskenv
            .pylintrc
            pytest.ini
            setup.cfg
            pyproject.toml
            tox.ini
            mypy.ini
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-python-configs-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/.pylintrc', '**/pytest.ini', '**/setup.cfg', '**/pyproject.toml', '**/tox.ini', '**/mypy.ini') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-python-configs-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Install dependencies
        if: steps.pip-cache.outputs.cache-hit != 'true'
        run: |
          python -m pip install --upgrade pip
          pip install -r requirements.txt

      - name: Run tests
        run: pytest

  docker-build:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Set up Docker Buildx
        uses: docker/setup-buildx-action@v3

      - name: Cache Docker layers
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: /tmp/.buildx-cache
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-docker-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/Dockerfile') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-docker-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-docker-

      - name: Build Docker image
        uses: docker/build-push-action@v5
        with:
          context: .
          push: false
          cache-from: type=local,src=/tmp/.buildx-cache
          cache-to: type=local,dest=/tmp/.buildx-cache-new,mode=max

      - name: Move cache
        run: |
          rm -rf /tmp/.buildx-cache
          mv /tmp/.buildx-cache-new /tmp/.buildx-cache

  multi-environment:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    strategy:
      matrix:
        environment: [development, staging, production]
    
    steps:
      - name: Checkout code
        uses: actions/checkout@v4

      - name: Setup Node.js
        uses: actions/setup-node@v4
        with:
          node-version: ${{ env.NODE_VERSION }}

      - name: Cache environment-specific dependencies
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: |
            node_modules
            ~/.npm
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.environment }}-deps-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('**/package-lock.json') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.environment }}-deps-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-
            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.environment }}-deps-

      - name: Cache environment configs
        uses: actions/cache@v3
        with:
          path: |
            .env.${{ matrix.environment }}
            config/${{ matrix.environment }}.json
            config/${{ matrix.environment }}.yml
          key: ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.environment }}-config-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-${{ hashFiles('config/**') }}
          restore-keys: |
            ${{ runner.os }}-${{ matrix.environment }}-config-${{ env.CACHE_VERSION }}-

      - name: Install dependencies
        run: npm ci

      - name: Build for environment
        run: npm run build:${{ matrix.environment }}
        env:
          NODE_ENV: ${{ matrix.environment }}

  cleanup-old-caches:
    runs-on: ubuntu-latest
    if: github.event_name == 'push' && github.ref == 'refs/heads/main'
    
    steps:
      - name: Cleanup old caches
        uses: actions/github-script@v7
        with:
          script: |
            const caches = await github.rest.actions.getActionsCacheList({
              owner: context.repo.owner,
              repo: context.repo.repo,
            })
            
            const now = new Date()
            const sevenDaysAgo = new Date(now.getTime() - 7 * 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000)
            
            for (const cache of caches.data.actions_caches) {
              const cacheDate = new Date(cache.created_at)
              if (cacheDate < sevenDaysAgo) {
                console.log(`Deleting cache: ${cache.key}`)
                await github.rest.actions.deleteActionsCacheById({
                  owner: context.repo.owner,
                  repo: context.repo.repo,
                  cache_id: cache.id,
                })
              }
            }
